Class DRTextField<T>

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.component.DRComponent
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.component.DRDimensionComponent
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.component.DRHyperLinkComponent
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.component.DRTextField<T>
All Implemented Interfaces:
DRIComponent, DRIDimensionComponent, DRIHyperLinkComponent, DRITextField<T>, Serializable
public class DRTextField<T> extends DRHyperLinkComponent implements DRITextField<T>

DRTextField class.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca, Jan Moxter

    • getColumns

      public Integer getColumns()

      getColumns.

      Returns the number of columns.

      Specified by:
      getColumns in interface DRITextField<T>
      Returns:
      a Integer object.

    • setColumns

      public void setColumns(Integer columns)
      This method is used to define the width of a column. The width is set to the columns multiplied by width of the character m for the font used
      Parameters:
      columns - the number of columns >= 0
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if columns is < 0

    • getRows

      public Integer getRows()

      getRows.

      Returns the number of rows.

      Specified by:
      getRows in interface DRITextField<T>
      Returns:
      a Integer object.

    • setRows

      public void setRows(Integer rows)
      This method is used to define the height of a column. The height is set to the rows multiplied by height of the font
      Parameters:
      rows - the number of rows >= 0
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if rows is < 0
